# protonpass_item_note (Data Source)

Reads a specific Proton Pass note item.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "protonpass_item_note" "example" {
  item_id  = "item_id_here"
  share_id = "share_id_here"
}

output "note_content" {
  value     = data.protonpass_item_note.example.note
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `item_id` (String) Item ID.
- `share_id` (String) Share ID of the vault.

### Read-Only

- `create_time` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `modify_time` (String) Last modification timestamp.
- `note` (String, Sensitive) Note content.
- `title` (String) Title of the note item.
